title: register
description: Extension -> Daemon. First message after the extension connects to the Unix socket. See SPEC.md § 10.1.

spawn_token.description: Hex-encoded 32-character spawn token (D6) when the daemon spawned this Pi process; null/absent when user-spawned.

tmux_target.description: tmux pane target string in `session:window.pane` form.

started_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds at which the Pi process started.
